heading: Removal from the Senior Executive Service
label: 3592 Removal from the Senior Executive Service

children.text: during the 1-year period of probation under , orsection 3393(d) of this title
at any time for less than fully successful executive performance as determined under subchapter II of chapter 43 of this title,

children.label: A
children.text: within 120 days after an appointment of the head of the agency; or

children.label: ii
children.text: has the authority to remove the career appointee.

children.label: A
children.text: any removal under ; orsection 4314(b)(3) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: any disciplinary action initiated before an appointment referred to in paragraph (1) of this subsection.

children.label: c
children.text: A limited emergency appointee, limited term appointee, or noncareer appointee may be removed from the service at any time.
